name: Star Seraph Scale
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光天使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホーリー・ライトニング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スケール
desc:
When this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Star Seraph" monster from your hand, then you can place 1 LIGHT monster from your Graveyard on top of your Deck. An Xyz Monster that was Summoned using 3 or more monsters, including this card on the field, as Xyz Materials gains this effect.
● Once per turn, while this card has Xyz Material, if a monster(s) is Special Summoned from the hand, immediately draw 1 card.
